statement.en: A Blended Value Proposition: Towards a Regional Sustainable Entrepreneurial Ecosystem Framework for the Social and Solidarity Economy in the Liverpool City Region.
statement.summary: This thesis investigates the development of a regional Social and Solidarity Economy (SSE) entrepreneurial ecosystem in Liverpool City Region. Integrating six theoretical lenses, it proposes a novel conceptual framework and identifies civic entrepreneurs as catalytic actors driving blended value creation through embedded, hybrid, and structurally negotiated organisational practices.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The axiom presents a provisional framework (novel conceptual model) under active development, not yet peer-reviewed or validated. Future date (2026-04-25) indicates preprint/early-stage thesis. The blended value proposition and SSE ecosystem framework are empirically testable in principle but remain in exploratory phase. Classification as FLOWING reflects: (1) stated novelty of framework, (2) multi-theoretical integration still requiring validation, (3) civic entrepreneur role identification pending longitudinal/case study evidence.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 社会と経済の織り交ぜが、市民の触媒作用によって地域の価値へと積分される。
